Greater Manchester Brownfield Sites

Environmental risk assessment of 1585 active brownfield sites.

Risk Factors:

  • Proximity to watercourses
  • Soil permeability
  • Terrain flatness

● High: 747 sites ● Medium: 766 sites ● Low: 72 sites
